title: Ashes of Tomorrow
author: Your Pen Name
description: A dying satellite, a signal that shouldn't exist, and the last person willing to chase it. A sample novel included so you can see how the site works.

title: The Underdogs of Sector 12
author: Your Pen Name
description: Eight neighborhood kids with no coach and no ground worth the name build a cricket team out of nothing but stubbornness — and find out what the game gives them beyond winning.

chapters.title: Chapter Two: The Coach Who Didn't Want the Job
Chapter Three: What They Were Missing
Chapter Five: What the Team Gave Each Kid

title: The Last Bench
author: Your Pen Name
description: Two boys share the last bench of Row C for nine years and build a friendship neither of them knows yet they'll spend the rest of their lives measuring everything against.

chapters.title: Chapter One: Two Boys, One Bench
Chapter Two: The Shape of a Whole Childhood
Chapter Five: The Letter Neither Sent

title: Three Rooms in Koramangala
author: Your Pen Name
description: Three women who became flatmates by accident become family on purpose — and find out what that really costs when one of them gets sick.

chapters.title: Chapter Three: What the Illness Revealed
Chapter Five: The Last Good Months
Chapter Seven: What Grief Leaves Behind

title: Crown of Thorns
author: Your Pen Name
description: An empress is murdered in her own palace on a night of celebration. What survives her is a disgraced prince, a quiet act of loyalty, and a court that isn't finished with either of them.

chapters.title: Chapter One: The Fall of an Empress
Chapter Seven: The Night That Doesn't Happen

title: The WhatsApp Group Called Chaos
author: Your Pen Name
description: Four college best friends, eight years and one group chat apart, reunite for a wedding in Goa — and find out how much they've been quietly not telling each other.

chapters.title: Chapter One: The Group That Never Dies
Chapter Three: The First Night, and the Cracks
Chapter Six: What Survives the Distance

title: The Last Coalition
author: Your Pen Name
description: A veteran chief minister has one skill that's kept him in power for eleven years: counting men. When defection threatens his government overnight, he has one weekend to prove he still knows how to count better than anyone trying to unseat him.

title: The Ledger
author: Your Pen Name
description: A local reporter receives forty photocopied pages that don't match the official record — and learns that publishing the truth is only the first, and easiest, cost of finding it.

title: Two Sons of Nandgaon
author: Your Pen Name
description: When a dynasty's patriarch is felled by a stroke, his two sons inherit not a seat, but a rivalry — one built patiently over five years, and paid for in loyalty neither of them ever stopped collecting.

title: The Hill Behind the Mine
author: Your Pen Name
description: A schoolteacher's son takes on a mining conglomerate and the MLA in its pocket, armed with nothing but eleven months of walking meetings and an arrears ledger nobody in power ever expected the village to see.

title: The Sweeper's Daughter
author: Your Pen Name
description: The daughter of a municipal sweeper takes on a family that's held her constituency for four decades — with a bicycle, a notebook of complaints, and a refusal to stop naming names.

title: The Last Single Screen
author: Your Pen Name
description: A single-screen cinema in Old Delhi is losing to multiplexes and real estate developers — and its owner has one final show left to convince his son it was never just a building.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: The Smell of Popcorn and Oil

title: Notes from the Borderland
author: Your Pen Name
description: A teenager in the Naga hills chases a K-pop audition while her grandmother tries to pass down a language of indigo dye and handloom weaving — until she finds the two aren't as far apart as they seem.

chapters.title: Chapter 4: The Sound of the Loom

title: Filter Coffee Conversations
author: Your Pen Name
description: A matrimonial app match built on filter coffee and honesty is tested by family expectations and a career-defining promotion that could send one of them across the country.
